## What changed

Briefly, what this PR does.

## Why

The problem it solves or the reason for the change. Link any related issue
(`Fixes #123`).

## How to test

Steps a reviewer can run to verify it works:

```
uv run pytest -q
uv run ruff check src tests
```

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Verified the change in the running app (if it affects the UI)

## Notes

Trade-offs, follow-ups, or rollback notes, if any.
